mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9 percent, labor market slack suppresses consumer spending expectations and corporate earnings growth, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts signal synchronized consumer and business demand recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60d returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) across out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices indicate expanding manufacturing capacity utilization and supply chain normalization, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week during early-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO MoM changes yield negative or flat 5d forward returns in > 55% of cases during early-cycle expansions, invalidating the supply-demand transmission channel.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI increase exceeding 0.5 percent triggers expectations of central bank tightening and margin compression, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL monthly spikes above 0.5% are followed by positive 20d returns in > 65% of instances, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) in high-inflation environments.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands aggregate income and supports corporate revenue forecasts, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: PAYEMS monthly increases fail to correlate with positive 60d forward returns (Rank IC < 0.03) across multiple market cycles, or positive payroll surprises consistently precede market declines.

mechanism_narrative: Negative quarterly GDP growth combined with rising unemployment confirms an economic contraction that reduces equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Concurrent negative GDP growth and rising unemployment fail to predict negative 20d returns (accuracy < 45%), or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly industrial production decline exceeding 1 percent signals acute supply chain disruptions and output bottlenecks, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week during supply shock regimes.
failure_condition: INDPRO monthly drops below -1.0% are followed by positive 5d returns in > 60% of cases, or the threshold signal shows no predictive edge (Rank IC < 0.02) during identified supply shock periods.
